common.title: Address Generator - Free Virtual Address Generation Tool
common.description: Free address generator supporting virtual addresses for US, Canada, UK, Singapore, Taiwan, Hong Kong and more regions. Perfect for registration and testing purposes.
common.keywords: address generator, virtual address, fake address, random address, testing address, US address, Canada address, UK address, Singapore address, Taiwan address, Hong Kong address

address.hk_zipcode_tooltip_aria: Hong Kong postal code filling instructions
address.hk_zipcode_tooltip_text: Hong Kong Post recommends leaving the field blank, or try filling in "000", "0000", "000000" or "HKG". The postal code "999077" assigned by China Post is not used locally and only exists in cross-border transportation in mainland China to address system technical limitations.

q1.question: Are the generated addresses real?
q1.answer: The generated address information is based on real geographic locations and postal code data, but personal information (such as names and phone numbers) is randomly generated virtual information for testing and learning purposes only.

q2.question: How to generate addresses for a specific state?
q2.answer: Enter the state name in the search box to generate a random address for that state. For example, enter "Delaware" and click search to generate a random address in Delaware.

q3.question: How to generate addresses for a specific city?
q3.answer: Enter the city name in the search box to generate a random address for that city. For example, enter "Los Angeles" and click search to generate a random address in Los Angeles.

q4.question: How to save generated addresses?
q4.answer: Click the "Save" button to save the generated address locally. Saved addresses can be viewed and managed on the "My Saved Addresses" page.

us_tax_free_states.title: Introduction to US Tax-Free States
us_tax_free_states.description: Learn about the detailed information of various tax-free states in the US, including tax policies and residential advantages.

us_address_structure.title: Understanding US Address Structure
us_address_structure.description: Deep dive into the composition structure of US addresses, including the meaning of streets, cities, states, zip codes and other components.

why_delaware_best_tax_free.title: Why Delaware is the Best Tax-Free State?
why_delaware_best_tax_free.description: In-depth analysis of Delaware's tax advantages, business environment, and registration convenience to understand why it's considered the best tax-free state.

hong_kong_address_structure.title: Hong Kong Address Structure Explained
hong_kong_address_structure.description: Detailed analysis of Hong Kong address composition structure, including districts, streets, building numbers and the meaning and format of each component.

how_to_use_fake_address_safely.title: How to Use Fake Address Generator Safely - Ultimate Guide
how_to_use_fake_address_safely.description: Learn how to use fake address generators safely for testing, privacy protection, and online registration. Avoid legal risks and understand the difference between valid and fake addresses.

footer.disclaimer: The generated address data comes from publicly available online resources, not for commercial use, for learning reference only.

terms.title: Terms of Use - Address Generator
terms.description: Terms of Use for Address Generator, understand service usage rules and restrictions.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the Address Generator website (address-generator.xyz), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

service_description.title: Service Description
service_description.content: Address Generator is a free online tool that provides the following features:

features.address_generation: Generate virtual address information for testing and development purposes
features.multiple_countries: Support address formats for multiple countries and regions
features.save_addresses: Save and manage generated address information
features.free_service: Completely free to use, no registration required

acceptable_use.title: Acceptable Use
acceptable_use.content: You may use our service for the following legitimate purposes:

items.fraud: Any form of fraud or illegal activities
items.illegal_activities: Activities that violate local, national, or international laws
items.system_abuse: Abuse or attack of our systems

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The generated address information is for testing and development use only. We do not guarantee the accuracy or authenticity of the information. Users should use at their own risk, and we are not responsible for any losses arising from the use of this service.

limitation_liability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation_liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data loss, or business interruption.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Any changes will take effect immediately upon posting on the website. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us through the website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Address Generator
privacy.description: Address Generator Privacy Policy, learn how we collect, use and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Address Generator (address-generator.xyz) values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you use our service.

information_collection.title: Information Collection
information_collection.content: We may collect the following types of information:

automatically_collected.title: Automatically Collected Information
automatically_collected.usage_data: Website usage data and access times

user_provided.title: User-Provided Information
user_provided.saved_addresses: Address information you choose to save (stored locally in your browser)

information_sharing.title: Information Sharing
information_sharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information in the following circumstances:

exceptions.service_providers: Trusted third-party service providers who assist us
exceptions.business_transfer: Business mergers, acquisitions, or asset transfers

data_storage.title: Data Storage
data_storage.content: Your saved address information is stored locally in your browser, and we do not store this information on our servers. You can delete this information at any time by clearing your browser data.

items.access: Access information we have collected about you
items.deletion: Request deletion of your personal information
items.portability: Request your data in a portable format
items.opt_out: Opt out of certain data collection

security.title: Security Measures
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, use, disclosure, modification, or destruction. However, please note that no method of Internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure.

children_privacy.title: Children's Privacy
children_privacy.content: Our service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and significant changes will be notified to you in a prominent manner. We recommend that you review this policy regularly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the website.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy - Address Generator
cookies.description: Address Generator Cookie Policy, learn how we use cookies and similar technologies.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: This Cookie Policy explains how Address Generator (address-generator.xyz) uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website. It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.

what_are_cookies.title: What are Cookies
what_are_cookies.content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.content: These cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of our website and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.content: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.

managing_cookies.title: Managing Cookies
managing_cookies.content: You can manage cookies in several ways:
managing_cookies.browser_settings: Control and/or delete cookies through your browser settings
managing_cookies.clear_cookies: Clear all cookies that have already been stored on your computer
managing_cookies.disable_cookies: Disable some or all cookies (this may affect website functionality)

third_party_cookies.title: Third-party Cookies
third_party_cookies.content: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-party cookies to report website usage statistics, deliver advertisements to you, etc. These cookies will only be used with your consent.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and significant changes will be notified to you in a prominent manner. We recommend that you review this policy regularly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Cookie Policy, please contact us through the website.
